sections.name: Canonical Root Documents
sections.description: These files define the canonical architecture meaning and repository entry points.

documents.title: README
documents.purpose: Repository entry point and top-level navigation.
next_actions: Keep terminology aligned with the canonical specification.

documents.title: Architecture Specification
documents.purpose: Canonical architecture technical specification for the Terraform 3-layer model.
next_actions: Keep templates and rollout scenarios aligned with published architecture pages.

documents.title: Architecture Conventions
documents.purpose: Canonical implementation and review conventions.
next_actions: Keep concrete examples aligned with the canonical specification.

documents.title: ADR-0001 Root Record
documents.purpose: Root ADR that records the architecture decision and rationale.
next_actions: Keep in sync with the published ADR page when ADR structure evolves.

sections.name: Published Documentation Portal
sections.description: These files support the published Hugo documentation portal.

documents.title: Docs Portal Index
documents.purpose: Human-friendly documentation landing page.
next_actions: Keep task-based navigation aligned with section indexes and documentation governance pages.

documents.title: Architecture Section Index
documents.purpose: Section entry point for architecture specification pages.
next_actions: Keep chapter structure aligned with the canonical specification and scenario/template pages.

documents.title: Architecture Overview Page
documents.purpose: Portal chapter for architecture purpose, scope, and design principles.
next_actions: Keep scope and non-goals aligned with the canonical specification overview.

documents.title: Reference Terms Page
documents.purpose: Lookup reference for architecture terms and commonly confused distinctions.
next_actions: Keep term definitions aligned with the canonical specification and conventions.

documents.title: Layers Page
documents.purpose: Published explanation of Foundation, Platform, and Service layer responsibilities.
next_actions: Keep layer examples and dependency rules aligned with the canonical specification.

documents.title: Contracts Page
documents.purpose: Published definition of the contract model, lifecycle, and compatibility rules.
next_actions: Keep contract examples and terminology synchronized with the canonical specification.

documents.title: Ownership and References Page
documents.purpose: Published guidance for resource ownership and allowed reference directions.
next_actions: Keep allowed exceptions and anti-patterns aligned with the canonical specification.

documents.title: Workspace Model Page
documents.purpose: Published explanation of workspace roles, split criteria, and anti-patterns.
next_actions: Keep workspace role terminology aligned with the canonical specification and conventions.

documents.title: Shared Resources Page
documents.purpose: Published guidance for resource sets and optional internal partitioning.
next_actions: Keep resource set examples aligned with the canonical specification and concrete examples.

documents.title: Service Dependencies Page
documents.purpose: Published rules for service-to-service contracts and mediated dependencies.
next_actions: Keep service dependency examples aligned with conventions and ADR rationale.

documents.title: Operations Page
documents.purpose: Published guidance for change propagation, breaking changes, and legacy modernization.
next_actions: Keep migration procedure wording aligned with the canonical specification.

documents.title: Safety and Resilience Page
documents.purpose: Published safety model for blast radius control, rollback, and migration.
next_actions: Keep review questions and failure expectations aligned with the canonical specification.

documents.title: Decision Checklist Page
documents.purpose: Published quick checklist for classifying layers, contracts, and workspace splits.
next_actions: Keep the checklist consistent with the canonical decision sequence.

documents.title: Shared Resource Design Template Page
documents.purpose: Reusable template for documenting new shared resource designs.
next_actions: Extend the template only when new shared resource patterns appear.

documents.title: Migration and Rollout Scenarios Page
documents.purpose: Scenario-driven guidance for contract migration, rollout, and rollback.
next_actions: Add new scenarios when real rollout patterns emerge.

documents.title: Conventions Section Index
documents.purpose: Section entry point for implementation conventions.
next_actions: Keep chapter navigation aligned with the actual conventions document set.

documents.title: Layer Classification Convention Page
documents.purpose: Published convention for classifying resources into Foundation, Platform, and Service.
next_actions: Keep classification examples aligned with the canonical conventions.

documents.title: Ownership Convention Page
documents.purpose: Published convention for determining lifecycle ownership.
next_actions: Keep ownership rules aligned with contract provider semantics.

documents.title: Contract Convention Page
documents.purpose: Published convention for contract naming, lifecycle, and publication.
next_actions: Keep publication examples synchronized with the canonical conventions.

documents.title: Workspace Convention Page
documents.purpose: Published convention for workspace design and split signals.
next_actions: Keep naming guidance and split heuristics aligned with the canonical conventions.

documents.title: Network and IAM Convention Page
documents.purpose: Published convention for SG ownership and workload role placement.
next_actions: Keep network and IAM guidance aligned with ownership and access-control rules.

documents.title: Shared Resource Convention Page
documents.purpose: Published convention for resource set-first design and optional partitioning.
next_actions: Keep examples aligned with the architecture shared resource pages.

documents.title: Service-to-Service Convention Page
documents.purpose: Published convention for service contracts and prohibited direct implementation dependencies.
next_actions: Keep service interface examples aligned with the architecture dependency model.

documents.title: Legacy Convention Page
documents.purpose: Published convention for interpreting and migrating legacy assets.
next_actions: Keep modernization guidance aligned with the canonical legacy transition procedure.

documents.title: Safety Convention Page
documents.purpose: Published convention for change safety, blast radius control, and rollback expectations.
next_actions: Keep anti-patterns aligned with the canonical safety section.

documents.title: Review Checklist Page
documents.purpose: Published review checklist for evaluating ownership, contracts, and workspace design.
next_actions: Keep review questions aligned with the canonical conventions checklist.

documents.title: Concrete Examples Page
documents.purpose: Operator-facing examples for workspace, naming, and shared resource conventions.
next_actions: Keep examples synchronized with the canonical conventions.

documents.title: ADR Index Page
documents.purpose: Published entry point for ADR navigation.
next_actions: Keep the ADR listing aligned with the canonical ADR set.

documents.title: ADR-0001 Published Page
documents.purpose: Published ADR summary that links back to the root decision record.
next_actions: Keep the status and summary aligned with the root ADR.

sections.name: Documentation Governance
sections.description: These files govern how Codex should maintain the documentation system itself.

documents.title: Repository AGENTS
documents.purpose: Rendered repository-specific agent instructions for maintaining the documentation system.
next_actions: Regenerate together with CLAUDE.md after updating docs/meta/agent-instructions.md.

documents.title: Repository CLAUDE
documents.purpose: Rendered Claude-compatible repository instructions mirrored from the shared agent guidance source.
next_actions: Regenerate together with AGENTS.md after updating docs/meta/agent-instructions.md.

documents.title: Agent Instructions Source
documents.purpose: Canonical source for the mirrored AGENTS.md and CLAUDE.md repository instruction files.
next_actions: Update this file first whenever repository agent guidance changes.

documents.title: Documentation System Index
documents.purpose: Entry point for the documentation maintenance and indexing system.
next_actions: Keep linked from the docs portal and AGENTS guidance.

documents.title: Document Registry
documents.purpose: Single machine-readable source of truth for document scope, ownership, and progress.
next_actions: Expand tracked documents whenever new portal or governance documents are added.

documents.title: Work Index
documents.purpose: Human-readable status board generated from the registry.
next_actions: Regenerate after every registry update.

documents.title: Terraform 3-Layer Doc Maintainer Skill
documents.purpose: Repository-local Codex skill for strengthening and maintaining the documentation system.
next_actions: Keep the workflow and referenced local files aligned with the repository layout.

documents.title: Repository Map Reference
documents.purpose: Repository-local reference map for document roles and maintenance boundaries used by the skill.
next_actions: Update when document families or canonical ownership boundaries change.

documents.title: Maintenance Playbook Reference
documents.purpose: Repository-local playbook for strengthening document structure and consistency.
next_actions: Refine after real maintenance tasks expose workflow gaps.
